title: Banana Elouan
description: An earthy and velvety monsoon Algerian dish featuring banana in a low-carb-friendly pressure-cook preparation.
instructions: Peel and finely chop the banana.
In a pressure cooker, add minced garlic and ginger with turmeric powder and cumin seeds. Stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add coconut milk and heavy cream to the mixture in the pot. Stir well.
Toss in the banana pieces and stir gently. Cover and cook on high heat until steam starts coming out, then reduce heat to low and cook further for about 1 minute.
Stir frequently as it cooks down to thicken slightly. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh coriander leaves before serving.
